Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 439

TLPL450 Advanced World Language Methods and Technology (3 Credits) Teaches advanced best practices for effective world language instruction. Topics include: using authentic assessment and materials, applying national standards, teaching writing and culture, motivating students, providing strategy instruction, infusing technology, preparing for PreK-12 employment, and creating a professional portfolio. Prerequisite: TLPL445.
